examples: The high ion conductive solid electrolyte is composed of a complex compound including water that has zirconic acid compound and polyvinyl alcohol.
The trial and application of inlaid zirconic exit of tundish in Concast Shop of No. 2 Steelmaking Plant, Tangshan Iron and Steel Company, are introduced.
The high ion conductive solid electrolyte is obtained which is composed of the complex compound having zirconic acid compound, polyvinyl alcohol, and water.
